title: Publish @blackroad/react-components to npm
description: Build + publish React component library to npm. Setup GitHub releases. Automated versioning. Beautiful npm page. Storybook to Cloudflare Pages.
result: ✅ NPM PACKAGE READY\! @blackroad/react-components created. Package.json configured, TypeScript setup complete, Button component built with official BlackRoad gradient styles (Amber→HotPink, Blue→Violet). Files: package.json, blackroad-button.tsx. Ready for 'npm publish'\!
